# pacta.portfolio.utils

The goal of pacta.portfolio.utils is to provide utility functions for
the PACTA for Investors tools and ecosystem.

## Installation

You can install the development version of pacta.portfolio.utils from
[R-universe](https://rmi-pacta.r-universe.dev/pacta.portfolio.utils)
with:

``` r
install.packages("pacta.portfolio.utils", repos = "https://rmi-pacta.r-universe.dev")
```

or from [GitHub](https://github.com/RMI-PACTA/pacta.portfolio.utils)
with:

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("RMI-PACTA/pacta.portfolio.utils")
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`abort_if_file_doesnt_exist()`](https://rmi-pacta.github.io/pacta.portfolio.utils/reference/abort_if_file_doesnt_exist.md)
  : Check if a file exists and abort with a message if not
- [`create_portfolio_subfolders()`](https://rmi-pacta.github.io/pacta.portfolio.utils/reference/create_portfolio_subfolders.md)
  : A short description of the function
- [`data_check()`](https://rmi-pacta.github.io/pacta.portfolio.utils/reference/data_check.md)
  : Checks whether a variable is a data frame
- [`empty_audit_file()`](https://rmi-pacta.github.io/pacta.portfolio.utils/reference/empty_audit_file.md)
  : A short description of the function
- [`empty_company_results()`](https://rmi-pacta.github.io/pacta.portfolio.utils/reference/empty_company_results.md)
  : A short description of the function
- [`empty_emissions_results()`](https://rmi-pacta.github.io/pacta.portfolio.utils/reference/empty_emissions_results.md)
  : A short description of the function
- [`empty_map_results()`](https://rmi-pacta.github.io/pacta.portfolio.utils/reference/empty_map_results.md)
  : A short description of the function
- [`empty_portfolio_overview()`](https://rmi-pacta.github.io/pacta.portfolio.utils/reference/empty_portfolio_overview.md)
  : A short description of the function
- [`empty_portfolio_results()`](https://rmi-pacta.github.io/pacta.portfolio.utils/reference/empty_portfolio_results.md)
  : A short description of the function
- [`get_build_version_msg()`](https://rmi-pacta.github.io/pacta.portfolio.utils/reference/get_build_version_msg.md)
  : A short description of the function
- [`log_user_errors()`](https://rmi-pacta.github.io/pacta.portfolio.utils/reference/log_user_errors.md)
  : Log user errors
- [`quit_if_no_pacta_relevant_data()`](https://rmi-pacta.github.io/pacta.portfolio.utils/reference/quit_if_no_pacta_relevant_data.md)
  : A short description of the function
- [`readRDS_or_return_alt_data()`](https://rmi-pacta.github.io/pacta.portfolio.utils/reference/readRDS_or_return_alt_data.md)
  : Return the object stored in a RDS at a specified file path, or an
  alternate value/object if the file doesn't exist.
- [`remove_if_exists()`](https://rmi-pacta.github.io/pacta.portfolio.utils/reference/remove_if_exists.md)
  : A short description of the function
- [`save_if_exists()`](https://rmi-pacta.github.io/pacta.portfolio.utils/reference/save_if_exists.md)
  : A short description of the function
- [`set_analysis_inputs_path()`](https://rmi-pacta.github.io/pacta.portfolio.utils/reference/set_analysis_inputs_path.md)
  : A short description of the function
- [`set_portfolio_parameters()`](https://rmi-pacta.github.io/pacta.portfolio.utils/reference/set_portfolio_parameters.md)
  : A short description of the function
- [`set_project_parameters()`](https://rmi-pacta.github.io/pacta.portfolio.utils/reference/set_project_parameters.md)
  : A short description of the function
- [`set_webtool_paths()`](https://rmi-pacta.github.io/pacta.portfolio.utils/reference/set_webtool_paths.md)
  : A short description of the function
- [`setup_project()`](https://rmi-pacta.github.io/pacta.portfolio.utils/reference/setup_project.md)
  : A short description of the function
- [`write_log()`](https://rmi-pacta.github.io/pacta.portfolio.utils/reference/write_log.md)
  : Write log
